checkin.journal:
Pain when laying on side. Hip hurts. Didn't have issues playing ping pong but felt pelvic floor.
Physical: HRV 34, lower. Pelvic pain and hip super elevated, worst in long time. Due to Motion Lab doing leg extension/flexion to exhaustion, sit ups, 30kg hip thrusts day before.
Emotional: Relatively okay but sleepy during day. Ate cacao for energy. Blue light blocking glasses in evening. Bloating 7/10. Bowel 1x level 3. Breathing exercises before sleep.
Gut: Super bloated today, polenta. Bloating
